# xUI

> xUI is an open-source collection of modern, interactive, themeable React + Tailwind CSS UI components. Copy, paste, and customize — every component ships as source you fully own. Built for Tailwind CSS v4 and React 19, installable via the shadcn CLI.

## Install

Components are distributed as a shadcn-compatible registry. Add any component with:

```
npx shadcn@latest add https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/r/<component>.json
```

## Components

- Cards: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/card
- Buttons: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/button
- Alerts: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/alert
- Profiles: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/profile
- FAQ: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/faq
- Lists: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/list
- AI Input: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/components/ai-input

## Hooks

- useAutoResizeTextarea: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs/hooks/use-auto-resize-textarea

## Docs

- Installation & getting started: https://x-ui-self.vercel.app/docs

## Tech

React 19, Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, Radix UI, lucide-react.
